# DEVOCEAN Lodge

> Eco-friendly beach lodge in Ponta do Ouro, far-southern Mozambique — safari tents, a garden cottage and a thatched chalet a few minutes from the beach. Family-run, great value, and a base for world-class scuba diving, dolphin swims and bush safaris. Every booking is confirmed personally by the reservations team.

DEVOCEAN Lodge is operated by TERRAfrique LDA in Ponta do Ouro (Matutuine, Maputo Province, Mozambique), at coordinates -26.8420, 32.8850. Rates are billed in US dollars. Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 10:00. Free Wi-Fi. Pets are not allowed.

## Accommodation
- **Safari Tent** — 12 m² canvas tent on a raised 3×6 m platform; twin/king beds, fan, mosquito mesh, power points, private terrace; shared hot-water ablutions. https://devoceanlodge.com/safari.html
- **Comfort Tent** — upgraded 12 m² tent with privacy walls; twin/king beds, fan, private terrace, and an en-suite bathroom under a thatched roof. https://devoceanlodge.com/comfort.html
- **Garden Cottage** — queen bed, inverter air-conditioning (cool & heat), desk & dining table, private terrace, and a private bathroom in a thatched roundavel. https://devoceanlodge.com/cottage.html
- **Thatched Chalet** — secluded, romantic chalet under palms; air-conditioning, twin/king beds, private bathroom, private terrace. https://devoceanlodge.com/chalet.html

## Experiences nearby
- Scuba diving on offshore reefs
- Ethical dolphin swims
- Ocean seafaris (whale watching May–October)
- Game safaris at Maputo National Park
- Beach & deep-sea fishing
- Surfing (boards & lessons)
- Walk to the old lighthouse for sweeping coastal views

## Location & getting there
Ponta do Ouro is in the far south of Mozambique, near the Kosi Bay border with South Africa. Many guests drive (a 4x4 is recommended for the sandy coastal roads) or arrange a transfer; the team can advise on the best route. Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/edhq5PGLLhGMh9rL6

## Booking & contact
- Talk to Mia, the AI receptionist, for live availability & rates: https://devoceanlodge.com/talk
- Book online: https://devoceanlodge.com/book/EN.html
- Email: info@devoceanlodge.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +258 84 418 2252
- The reservations team personally confirms every booking.
